global_execution_rules: one scoped governance/* extraction branch per candidate or tightly-coupled wave
no direct merge from source backlog branches
extract only listed file-level runtime/governance/test/dependency deltas
exclude generated evidence, docs, recovery archives, and unrelated artifacts unless separately approved
full suite required before merge-readiness claim
USBAY-AUDIT and USBAY-GLOBAL23 review required before merge
